hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); case "$cmd" in *"git commit"*|*"git push"*) ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; out=$(cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings 2>&1) || { echo 'Blocked: cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings must pass before commit/push.' >&2; echo "$out" | grep -E '^(error|warning)' | head -20 >&2; exit 2; }
